title: Longest Continuous Subarray With Absolute Diff Less Than or Equal to Limit
hints: Consider expanding a window from left to right. What property must hold for every element inside the window to satisfy the condition?
Use a sliding window approach. You need a data structure that efficiently tracks the minimum and maximum values in the current window.
The window is valid if the difference between its current maximum and minimum does not exceed the limit. Shrink the window from the left when this difference becomes too large.
